profile.name: Abelliuxl
profile.bio: Licensed Doctor, Unlicensed AI Therapist. I build small, practical tools around medicine, games, automation, and AI.
profile.background: This is my personal Macintosh-style workspace: part portfolio, part toolbox, part lab notebook. Most of the things here are built to solve a real annoyance first, then kept small enough to understand and maintain.

projects.title: Chatbutte
projects.description: Standalone web service hosted on server94.

projects.title: WOW Pal Data
projects.description: World of Warcraft data page hosted as a separate web service.

writings.title: Tools should stay small
writings.excerpt: The best personal tools usually start with one concrete problem and keep their shape close to the workflow.

writings.title: Medicine, games, and automation
writings.excerpt: My projects tend to sit between clinical thinking, World of Warcraft data, local automation, and practical AI helpers.

writings.title: A quiet desktop for noisy ideas
writings.excerpt: This page keeps the old Macintosh metaphor because a simple desktop still works well for a personal control panel.

blogPosts.title: When Ctrl+Arrow Would Not Switch Spaces
blogPosts.excerpt: A debugging note on SideClick, CGEvent, Hammerspoon, and why macOS Mission Control only accepted the final private-source event sequence.

notes.author: Abelliuxl
notes.content: Building practical AI and automation tools that are useful before they are impressive.

notes.author: Abelliuxl
notes.content: Most of my public work sits between World of Warcraft addons, local automation, small web apps, and tools that can live on a personal server.

notes.author: Abelliuxl
notes.content: Make the tool solve one real problem. Keep deployment simple enough to remember. Prefer readable systems over clever ones.

apps.title: Chatbutte
apps.description: Standalone web service hosted on server94.

apps.title: WOW Pal Data
apps.description: World of Warcraft data page hosted as a separate web service.

githubProjects.title: main-page
githubProjects.description: A responsive Mac OS X Aqua-style personal homepage with draggable desktop windows, mobile navigation, bilingual content, Markdown-powered blog publishing, and direct deployment to a personal server.

githubProjects.title: BlizzQuestFrameSkin
githubProjects.description: A standalone World of Warcraft skin that gives Blizzard quest, gossip, quest-log detail, world-map quest, and objective-tracker frames a consistent dark translucent appearance without depending on a larger UI framework.

githubProjects.title: BlizzDamageMeterSkin
githubProjects.description: A lightweight standalone skin for Blizzard's native damage meter that changes only its visible textures and styling while leaving the protected combat-data logic untouched.

githubProjects.title: ez-translate-lite (fork)
githubProjects.description: A streamlined browser translation extension powered by configurable LLM providers, with hover and popup translation, draggable results, direct copying, automatic language detection, and custom OpenAI- or Anthropic-compatible endpoints.

githubProjects.title: weauto
githubProjects.description: 微信纯OCR机器人服务（macOS）

githubProjects.title: weauto-bridge
githubProjects.description: A macOS GUI-only WeChat automation bridge that uses screenshots and OCR to detect conversations, forwards events to Hermes or OpenClaw, and executes structured actions without hooks, process injection, or database access.

githubProjects.title: raidbots-cn-extension
githubProjects.description: A Chrome and Edge extension for Chinese Raidbots users that translates equipment, enchants, gems, consumables, buffs, and interface labels while adding Chinese item search assistance to Top Gear.

githubProjects.title: CraftSim (fork)
githubProjects.description: A fork of the CraftSim World of Warcraft profession addon, providing crafting-cost and average-profit calculations, reagent optimization, simulation, craft queues, pricing tools, cooldown tracking, and other gold-making utilities.

githubProjects.title: ClayToolBox
githubProjects.description: A World of Warcraft custom macro toolbox with a movable launcher, its own SavedVariables-backed macro library, an icon picker and editor, and secure buttons for running macros without consuming Blizzard's normal macro slots.

githubProjects.title: HideDesktopIcon
githubProjects.description: A lightweight macOS tool to hide/show desktop icons with one click, featuring status bar integration, multi-language support, and auto-launch on startup.

githubProjects.title: ScriptRunner
githubProjects.description: An in-game World of Warcraft Lua script manager with a built-in editor, persistent script library, syntax validation, import tools, execution statistics, and manual, automatic, or delayed run modes.

githubProjects.title: LCG_for_CopyEnglishName
githubProjects.description: This project processes data from wow_tools to generate Lua chunks compatible with the CopyEnglishName project (https://github.com/Abelliuxl/CopyEnglishName).

githubProjects.title: TUNTray
githubProjects.description: 🛠️ A lightweight Windows tray GUI for xjasonlyu/tun2socks — start, stop, and switch proxy servers with ease

githubProjects.title: bilibili-web-client
githubProjects.description: An Android TV WebView client for Bilibili that presents the desktop website with persistent login, fullscreen HTML5 playback, remote-control navigation, adjustable zoom, and optional JavaScript/CSS enhancements.

githubProjects.title: fps2x
githubProjects.description: A lightweight cross-platform video frame-rate multiplier built with Go and Fyne, using FFmpeg and RIFE-NCNN-Vulkan to interpolate frames and turn footage such as 30 fps video into 60 fps output.

githubProjects.title: chatbutte
githubProjects.description: A pure-frontend LLM chat workstation with multiple OpenAI-compatible model profiles, independent subtopics and system prompts, streaming Markdown responses, bilingual UI, and local import/export of browser-stored data.

githubProjects.title: StringVault
githubProjects.description: StringVault - Secure string storage system with admin authentication, session security, and data backup capabilities.

githubProjects.title: Mythic_Performance_Tracker
githubProjects.description: Mythic Performance Tracker: A  Python tool that crawls Mythic+ dungeon performance data from Warcraft Logs and generates interactive HTML visualization reports with analytics.

githubProjects.title: TaimeiBot
githubProjects.description: 🤖 TaimeiBot Pro - Professional World of Warcraft Kook Bot  A professional World of Warcraft bot based on khl.py, featuring talent queries, AI chat, auto-translation, voice capabilities, and professional process management. Designed for 24/7 stable operation and comprehensive gaming assistance.

githubProjects.title: raider_data
githubProjects.description: Python script to extract data of the top 5 players' rankings in World of Warcraft from the website raider.io. The obtained data can be further used to retrieve specific talents and other information through the raider.io API.

githubProjects.title: Abelliuxl
githubProjects.description: The GitHub profile repository for Abel Liu, introducing his hospital and orthopedic background, biomedical machine-learning interests, gaming interests, and work with software tools, automation, and data pipelines.

githubProjects.title: clash-for-linux-backup (fork)
githubProjects.description: Linux最完整的Clash for Linux的备份仓库，完全可以使用！由Yizuko进行修复及维护

githubProjects.title: AI-Image-Renamer
githubProjects.description: Smart image renaming tool that uses AI to generate descriptive filenames automatically. Features    include duplicate detection, batch processing, GPU acceleration, and CSV logging. Built with   PyTorch and Salesforce BLIP model for intelligent image captioning.

githubProjects.title: NodeTea
githubProjects.description: A real-time chat and file management web application built with Node.js, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

githubProjects.title: TalentBGReplacer
githubProjects.description: TalentBGReplacer is a World of Warcraft addon that allows users to customize talent background images.

githubProjects.title: CopyEnglishName
githubProjects.description: A simple World of Warcraft addon to copy the English names of items, spells, quests, etc. Ideal for players on non-English clients who need to search for information on sites like Wowhead.

githubProjects.title: CurseZip
githubProjects.description: CurseZip is a Go-based command-line tool designed to package game mod files into .zip or .tar.gz archives, with flexible exclusion rules for unwanted files and directories.

githubProjects.title: CopyEnglishName_Data
githubProjects.description: The load-on-demand data companion for the CopyEnglishName World of Warcraft addon, containing chunked Chinese-English item-name tables and lookup logic for item IDs, links, and Chinese names.

githubProjects.title: Abelliuxl.github.io
githubProjects.description: A GitHub Pages repository used to publish a generated SimulationCraft report, preserving detailed World of Warcraft simulation results, charts, player statistics, and the exact simulation configuration in a static page.

githubProjects.title: ChineseWoWClassSpecAbbreviations
githubProjects.description: A structured reference of Chinese World of Warcraft class and specialization nicknames and abbreviations, covering the shorthand commonly used in group listings, discussions, and strategy notes.

profile.bio: 持证医生，非持证 AI 治疗师。我围绕医学、游戏、自动化和 AI 构建小而实用的工具。
profile.background: 这是我的 Macintosh 风格个人工作台，平时用来放作品、常用工具和一些折腾记录。这里的东西大多源于日常遇到的具体问题：先想办法把问题解决，再尽量做得简单、好懂，也方便以后自己维护。
skills: 和 AI 一起做东西

ui.contactIntro: 欢迎联系我，我很乐意认识新朋友。

Chatbutte.description: 部署在 server94 上的独立 Web 服务。

WOW Pal Data.description: 作为独立 Web 服务部署的魔兽世界数据页面。

/blog/sideclick-cgevent-control-arrow.ht.title: 当 Ctrl+方向键就是不肯切换桌面
/blog/sideclick-cgevent-control-arrow.ht.excerpt: 一篇关于 SideClick、CGEvent、Hammerspoon，以及 macOS Mission Control 最终为何只接受特定私有事件源序列的调试记录。

current-focus.content: 正在构建实用的 AI 和自动化工具：先真正有用，再考虑看起来是否厉害。

public-work.content: 我的公开项目大多分布在魔兽世界插件、本地自动化、小型 Web 应用，以及能够运行在个人服务器上的工具之间。

rules.content: 让工具解决一个真实问题。让部署简单到不需要查说明。可读的系统优先于聪明的系统。

main-page.description: 一个响应式 Mac OS X Aqua 风格个人主页，桌面端有可拖动窗口，移动端有分页导航，并支持中英双语、Markdown 博客生成和一键部署到个人服务器。

BlizzQuestFrameSkin.description: 独立的魔兽世界原生任务界面皮肤，为任务、对话、任务日志详情、世界地图任务和目标追踪器统一添加深色半透明外观，不依赖大型 UI 框架。

BlizzDamageMeterSkin.description: 轻量独立的暴雪原生伤害统计皮肤，只调整窗口可见纹理和样式，不接管或修改受保护的战斗数据逻辑。

ez-translate-lite (fork).description: 精简版浏览器翻译扩展，通过可配置的大模型服务提供划词和弹窗翻译，支持拖动结果、直接复制、自动识别语言，以及自定义 OpenAI 或 Anthropic 兼容接口。

weauto.description: 运行在 macOS 上的微信纯 OCR 机器人服务。

weauto-bridge.description: 仅通过 macOS 图形界面操作微信的自动化桥接层，使用截图和 OCR 识别会话，将事件转发给 Hermes 或 OpenClaw 并执行结构化动作，不使用 Hook、进程注入或微信数据库。

raidbots-cn-extension.description: 面向中文 Raidbots 用户的 Chrome/Edge 扩展，可翻译装备、附魔、宝石、消耗品、团队增益和界面标签，并为 Top Gear 增加中文物品搜索辅助。

CraftSim (fork).description: CraftSim 魔兽世界专业制造插件的分支版本，提供制造成本与平均利润计算、材料优化、模拟制造、制作队列、价格工具、冷却追踪等赚金币辅助功能。

ClayToolBox.description: 魔兽世界自定义宏工具箱，包含可移动入口、独立保存的宏列表、图标选择器和编辑器，并通过安全按钮执行宏，不占用暴雪自带宏栏位。

HideDesktopIcon.description: 一款轻量级 macOS 工具，可一键隐藏或显示桌面图标，支持菜单栏、多语言和开机启动。

ScriptRunner.description: 魔兽世界游戏内 Lua 脚本管理器，带代码编辑器、持久化脚本库、语法检查、导入和执行统计，并支持手动、加载后自动及延迟执行。

LCG_for_CopyEnglishName.description: 处理 wow_tools 数据，并生成与 CopyEnglishName 项目兼容的 Lua 数据分块。

TUNTray.description: 面向 xjasonlyu/tun2socks 的轻量 Windows 托盘界面，可方便地启动、停止和切换代理服务器。

bilibili-web-client.description: 面向 Android TV 的 Bilibili WebView 客户端，以桌面网页模式提供登录状态保留、HTML5 全屏播放、遥控器导航、页面缩放和可选的 JavaScript/CSS 增强。

fps2x.description: 使用 Go 和 Fyne 编写的轻量跨平台视频插帧工具，通过 FFmpeg 与 RIFE-NCNN-Vulkan 生成中间帧，可将 30 fps 等视频提升为 60 fps。

chatbutte.description: 纯前端大模型聊天工作台，支持多个 OpenAI 兼容模型配置、独立子话题与系统提示词、流式 Markdown 回复、中英双语界面，以及浏览器本地数据的导入导出。

StringVault.description: 安全字符串存储系统，包含管理员认证、会话安全和数据备份功能。

Mythic_Performance_Tracker.description: 从 Warcraft Logs 抓取史诗钥石地下城表现数据，并生成交互式分析报告的 Python 工具。

TaimeiBot.description: 基于 khl.py 的专业魔兽世界 KOOK 机器人，支持天赋查询、AI 对话、自动翻译、语音和进程管理，可长期稳定运行。

raider_data.description: 从 raider.io 提取魔兽世界前五名玩家排行数据，并可继续通过 API 获取天赋等详细信息的 Python 脚本。

Abelliuxl.description: Abel Liu 的 GitHub 个人资料仓库，介绍其医院与骨科背景、生物医学机器学习方向、游戏兴趣，以及软件工具、自动化和数据流程方面的实践。

clash-for-linux-backup (fork).description: 可直接使用的 Clash for Linux 完整备份仓库，由 Yizuko 修复和维护。

AI-Image-Renamer.description: 使用 AI 自动生成描述性文件名的智能图片重命名工具，支持重复检测、批处理、GPU 加速和 CSV 日志，基于 PyTorch 与 Salesforce BLIP。

NodeTea.description: 使用 Node.js、HTML、CSS 和 JavaScript 构建的实时聊天与文件管理 Web 应用。

TalentBGReplacer.description: 允许玩家自定义天赋背景图片的魔兽世界插件。

CopyEnglishName.description: 用于复制物品、法术、任务等英文名称的魔兽世界插件，方便非英文客户端玩家在 Wowhead 等网站搜索资料。

CurseZip.description: 基于 Go 的命令行打包工具，可将游戏模组打包为 .zip 或 .tar.gz，并支持灵活的文件和目录排除规则。

CopyEnglishName_Data.description: CopyEnglishName 魔兽世界插件的按需加载数据组件，保存分块的中英文物品名称表，并提供按物品 ID、物品链接和中文名称查询英文名的逻辑。

Abelliuxl.github.io.description: 用于发布 SimulationCraft 生成报告的 GitHub Pages 仓库，以静态页面保留魔兽世界模拟结果、图表、角色统计和完整模拟配置。

ChineseWoWClassSpecAbbreviations.description: 整理魔兽世界各职业与专精常用中文别称和缩写的结构化参考数据，可用于组队列表、玩家交流和攻略文本中的简称识别。
